title: helianthemum origanifolium subsp. serrae
intro: Helianthemum origanifolium subsp. serrae, also known as Serralunga rockrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum origanifolium subsp. serrae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
